project.name: gpgpu-kb
project.summary: Self-updating GPGPU chip-architecture research knowledge base. Daily ingest of ArXiv / curated RSS / GitHub trending; per-source-type LLM scoring on universal axes (quality, relevance); ChromaDB-backed semantic search and RAG chat over the corpus; bilingual (en/zh) Markdown daily reports; Dockerized deployment with optional cron pipeline.

api_routes: GET /api/papers (sort_by adds quality_score|relevance_score|total_score; default total_score; include_low_quality flag)
GET /api/papers/search (semantic with keyword fallback; LIKE wildcards escaped)
POST /api/chat (optional Bearer token via KB_CHAT_TOKEN, hmac.compare_digest)
GET /api/stats (adds top_overall: cross-source-type top-5 by max(quality, relevance))
data_models: Paper (papers): now includes universal score axes quality_score / relevance_score / score_rationale alongside legacy originality_score / impact_score / impact_rationale
modules.config: backend/kb/config.py (Pydantic Settings, KB_* env, .env). New fields: language, ingest_empty_db_days, ingest_gap_min_days, ingest_gap_max_days, deepseek_*, chat_token, quality_score_threshold, data_dir.
modules.dependencies: backend/pyproject.toml (extras: ml, llm-cloud, dev). Docker controls extras via ARG INSTALL_EXTRAS=ml,llm-cloud (default).
modules.tests: backend/tests/ (~95 tests, coverage ~74%). New coverage: per-source-type rubrics (paper/blog/talk/project), Chinese mode prompt injection, JSON-key translation rejection, non-paper bypass of quality gate, paper legacy field mirroring, top_overall, LIKE escape, RSS dict-categories backfill.
llm_providers: hermes (local CLI; not available in Docker)

auth.chat_endpoint: Optional Bearer token via KB_CHAT_TOKEN; compared via hmac.compare_digest in verify_chat_token (Depends in /api/chat).

scoring.quality_gate: max(quality, relevance) >= KB_QUALITY_SCORE_THRESHOLD (default 7.0). Applied ONLY to source_type=paper. Non-papers always go to is_processed=1 on JSON parse success. JSON parse failure / translated keys / missing keys leave is_processed=0 for retry.
scoring.paper_legacy_mirror: For papers, summarize_and_score copies quality→originality_score, relevance→impact_score, score_rationale→impact_rationale to keep legacy API consumers and stored reports stable.

ingestion.adaptive_lookback: kb/ingestion/run.py::_compute_days_back(): empty DB → KB_INGEST_EMPTY_DB_DAYS; otherwise now - max(ingested_date) clamped to [KB_INGEST_GAP_MIN_DAYS, KB_INGEST_GAP_MAX_DAYS].

modules.cold_start_handling: kb.daily detects whether any paper has is_processed != 0 (processing) and whether any is_processed=1 row has chroma_id != '' (embedding). If neither, run_processing / index_unindexed_papers run with batch_size=None to drain the entire backlog. Steady-state runs cap at 100/run.

chinese_mode.scope: summarize prompt suffix, score_rationale value (JSON keys stay English), daily report content + title + section names. CLI override: python -m kb.daily --lang zh.

docker.dockerfile: backend/Dockerfile (python:3.12-slim, build-essential + curl, ARG INSTALL_EXTRAS=ml,llm-cloud, VOLUME /app/data, HEALTHCHECK /api/health, CMD uvicorn)
docker.daily_profile: docker compose --profile cron run --rm daily (one-shot pipeline reusing backend image)

modules.types: frontend/src/lib/types.ts (mirrors backend kb/schemas.py; adds quality_score / relevance_score / score_rationale and Stats.top_overall?)
modules.score_resolution: _resolveScores(paper): paper rows fall back to originality_score/impact_score when universal axes are 0 (legacy data); non-paper rows always use universal axes directly. Mirrored in src/components/paper-card.tsx and src/app/paper/[id]/page.tsx.

coverage_summary.notes: Major delta between 2026-04-25 16:50 and this run: universal score axes (paper/blog/talk/project rubrics), Chinese-language LLM mode (KB_LANGUAGE), Docker Compose deployment stack with separate Dockerfiles + .dockerignores + .env.docker.example, Next.js standalone build with /api/* reverse proxy (eliminates CORS), adaptive ingestion lookback window (KB_INGEST_*), cold-start uncapped processing/embedding, one-shot rescore_non_papers.py operations script, RSS feed pruning (AnandTech / Meta AI Blog removed), PaperOut.categories field_validator for legacy dict tags. All deltas verified against the actual modified files listed in the run's git status.

changelog.summary: Created root CLAUDE.md, backend/CLAUDE.md, frontend/CLAUDE.md, and .claude/index.json

Synced docs with code deltas: deepseek LLM provider, /api/chat Bearer Token guard via verify_chat_token + hmac.compare_digest (KB_CHAT_TOKEN), .github/workflows/ci.yml (3-job CI), Playwright e2e suite, backend/tests/README.md.
Documented KB_QUALITY_SCORE_THRESHOLD (default 7.0), is_processed buckets 0/1/2, /api/papers default-hides low quality, /api/stats split into processed/skipped_low_quality/pending.

Major refresh covering deltas across all changed files in git status: (1) Universal Score Axes — Paper.quality_score / relevance_score / score_rationale columns with idempotent SQLite migration; per-source-type rubrics (paper=originality/impact mirrored to legacy fields, blog=depth/actionability, talk=depth/actionability, project=innovation/maturity); /api/papers sort_by adds quality_score|relevance_score|total_score (default total_score = sum of all four scoring fields); /api/stats adds top_overall (cross-type top-5 by max(quality, relevance)); reports.py orders by max(quality, relevance) so non-papers can show up; non-papers bypass quality gate, JSON parse failure / translated-keys / missing required keys all preserve is_processed=0 for retry. (2) Chinese-language LLM output — KB_LANGUAGE=zh injects _lang_instruction (full summary in Chinese) and _impact_lang_instruction (only score_rationale value in Chinese; JSON keys stay English); kb.daily --lang zh CLI override; daily report title 每日研究简报 — and Chinese section names. (3) Docker Compose deployment — root docker-compose.yml + .env.docker.example; backend/Dockerfile (python:3.12-slim, ARG INSTALL_EXTRAS=ml,llm-cloud, HEALTHCHECK /api/health, VOLUME /app/data); frontend/Dockerfile (3-stage standalone build, alpine non-root, HEALTHCHECK GET /); per-side .dockerignore; daily service via --profile cron. (4) Next.js standalone + reverse proxy — next.config.ts adds output:'standalone', /api/:path* → KB_BACKEND_URL rewrite, /search → / redirect; src/lib/api.ts API_BASE defaults to '' (same-origin), eliminating CORS in normal deployments. (5) Adaptive ingestion lookback — kb/ingestion/run.py::_compute_days_back uses KB_INGEST_EMPTY_DB_DAYS for cold-start, MAX(ingested_date) gap clamped to [KB_INGEST_GAP_MIN_DAYS, KB_INGEST_GAP_MAX_DAYS] otherwise. (6) Cold-start uncapped processing/embedding — kb.daily detects whether any paper has been processed/embedded and drains the entire backlog if not, then caps at 100/run for steady state. (7) New ops script — backend/kb/scripts/rescore_non_papers.py (--dry-run / --limit / --source-type) backfills universal scores on legacy non-paper rows. (8) RSS feed pruning — removed AnandTech (defunct) and Meta AI Blog (no public RSS); 11 verified feeds remain; tag normalization (_tag_to_str + PaperOut.categories field_validator) handles legacy feedparser dict rows without 500. (9) Frontend universal-axes UI — paper-card.tsx and paper/[id]/page.tsx mirror SCORE_LABELS; _resolveScores does universal-first with paper-legacy fallback. (10) Tests — added per-rubric assertions (FAANG / TECHNICAL DEPTH / INNOVATION / MATURITY / ACTIONABILITY), Chinese-mode prompt assertions, JSON-key translation rejection test, top_overall test, LIKE-escape test, dict-categories backfill tests; suite grew from ~75 to ~95 cases. All deltas verified by reading the actual modified source files (kb/main.py, daily.py, database.py, models.py, schemas.py, config.py, reports.py, processing/llm.py, processing/embeddings.py, ingestion/rss.py, ingestion/run.py, scripts/rescore_non_papers.py; frontend next.config.ts, layout.tsx, page.tsx, paper/[id]/page.tsx, components/paper-card.tsx, lib/api.ts, lib/types.ts, app/globals.css; root README.md, docker-compose.yml, .env.docker.example, backend/Dockerfile, frontend/Dockerfile, both .dockerignore files; tests/test_api_smoke.py, test_processing_llm.py, test_reports.py, test_ingestion_rss.py).
